content.text: Conflict in `internal/agent/tools.go`. Let me examine it.

The conflict is in the `destructiveTools` map (lines 210-246). The HEAD version (from #35 Prowlarr PR) has the indexer tools but is missing the Radarr write tools. The incoming commit adds Radarr write tools but doesn't have the indexer tools. I need to merge both.
